name: Pannekoeken (Dutch Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour and sugar.
2. Make a well in the center and pour in the milk.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, then mix in the remaining ingredients until the batter is smooth.
To cook:
4. Heat a large frying pan or Dutch oven over medium-high heat. If using butter, let it melt before adding the oil.
5. Pour about 2 tablespoons of batter into the hot pan and spread to form a thin layer.
6. Cook for about 1-2 minutes until the edges start to brown, then carefully flip the pancake and cook the other side for an additional minute.
7. Repeat with remaining batter.
8. Serve hot with your favorite toppings such as sliced bacon, apple slices, or maple syrup. Enjoy!
